Package recoder.io

Interface PropertyNames

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultProjectFileIO, PrettyPrinter, ProjectSettings
public interface PropertyNames
This interface defines the known property names in the project settings.

  • Field Details

    • OUTPUT_PATH

      static final String OUTPUT_PATH
      Property output.path.

      Defines the output path used by the SourceFileRepositoryto write back changed or new compilation units. Defaults to the corresponding environment variable or if there is none, the current user directory.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INPUT_PATH

      static final String INPUT_PATH
      Property input.path.

      Defines the search path list used by the ClassFileRepositoryand SourceFileRepositoryto load new classes. Defaults to the corresponding environment variable or if there is none, the current class path, or if there is none, ".". The system should at least define the java.lang-classes.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • JDK1_4

      static final String JDK1_4
      Property jdk1.4.

      Defines the global behavior of the parser and lexer: If set, assert is considered a keyword, otherwise no assert statement can be parsed. The setting defaults to true

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • JAVA_5

      static final String JAVA_5
      Property JAVA_5.

      Defines the global behavior of the parser and lexer: If set, Java 5 language features (like generics, autoboxing, ...) are accepted. Setting this property to true automatically sets the property JDK1_4 to true. The setting defaults to true

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ADD_NEWLINE_AT_END_OF_FILE

      static final String ADD_NEWLINE_AT_END_OF_FILE
      Property ADD_NEWLINE_AT_END_OF_FILE

      If set to true, adds an extra newline at end of each source file, which allows to parse files that end with a single line comment (without a newline feed). While those are not valid .java-files, most compilers accept these files. The setting defaults to true

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ERROR_THRESHOLD

      static final String ERROR_THRESHOLD
      Property error.threshold.

      Defines the maximum number of errors the error handler accepts before falling back to a safe state.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CLASS_SEARCH_MODE

      static final String CLASS_SEARCH_MODE
      Property class.search.mode.

      Defines the search mode of the NameInfo. Valid values consist of a combination of at most one of each mode indicators 's','c' and 'r' (or uppercase versions).

      's'
      look for source files
      'c'
      look for class files
      'r'
      look for classes by runtime reflection

      Examples:
      "sc"- default setting, looks for source files, then class files.
      "scr"- use reflection as a last resort.
      ""- do not reload classes at all.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OVERWRITE_PARSE_POSITIONS

      static final String OVERWRITE_PARSE_POSITIONS
      Property overwriteParsePositions.

      If set, global parse positions of source elements are reset by the pretty printer according to the new positions. Default is false.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OVERWRITE_INDENTATION

      static final String OVERWRITE_INDENTATION
      Property overwriteIndentation.

      If set, indentations are always set by the pretty printer, even if they already are defined. Default is false.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INDENTATION_AMOUNT

      static final String INDENTATION_AMOUNT
      Property indentationAmount.

      The number of blanks for each indentation level. Default is 4.

      n = 2 n = 3 n = 4 
       
      
 while (i < n) { if (a[i] == x) { return i; } i += 1; }

 
       
      
 while (i < n) { if (a[i] == x) { return i; } i += 1; }

 
       
      
 while (i < n) { if (a[i] == x) { return i; } i += 1; }
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_STATEMENT_BLOCKS

      static final String GLUE_STATEMENT_BLOCKS
      Property glueStatementBlocks.

      If set, the opening bracket of a statement block follows immediately after the parent instruction. Default is true.

      true false 
       
      
 void foo() { ...
 
      
 
      
 while... { ...

 
       
      
 void foo() { ...
 
      
 while... { ...
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_SEQUENTIAL_BRANCHES

      static final String GLUE_SEQUENTIAL_BRANCHES
      Property glueSequentialBranches.

      If set, branches Else, Catch, Default, Catch and Finally follows immediately after the closing bracket of the previous branch or the enclosing statement. Default is true. If set, the property glueStatementBlocks should also be set.

      true false 
       
      
 ... } else ...
 ' switch ... case ... case ... default ...
 
      
 ... } catch ... } catch ... } finally ...

 
       
      
 ... } else ...
 
      
 switch ... case ... case ... default ...
 
      
 ... } catch ... } catch ... } finally ...
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_CONTROL_EXPRESSIONS

      static final String GLUE_CONTROL_EXPRESSIONS
      Property glueControlExpressions.

      If set, the boolean condition of a conditional statement follows immediately after the statement keyword. Default is false.

      true false 
       
      
 if(x > 0) ...

 
       
      
 if (x > 0) ...
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_PARAMETER_LISTS

      static final String GLUE_PARAMETER_LISTS
      Property glueParameterLists.

      If set, the parameter list of a method declaration as well as a method call and exception catch clauses follows immediately after the method name or the catch symbol. Default is true.

      true false 
       
      
 void foo(...)
 
      
 catch(...)

 
       
      
 void foo (...)
 
      
 catch (...)
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_PARAMETERS

      static final String GLUE_PARAMETERS
      Property glueParameters.

      If set, the parameters of a method declaration as well as the arguments of a method call follows immediately after the comma. Default is false.

      true false 
       
      
 foo(x,y,z)

 
       
      
 foo(x, y, z)
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_PARAMETER_PARENTHESES

      static final String GLUE_PARAMETER_PARENTHESES
      Property glueParameterParentheses.

      If set, the parameters of a method declaration as well as a method call follow / end immediately after / before the parantheses. Default is true.

      true false 
       
      
 foo(x,...,z)

 
       
      
 foo( x,...,z )
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_EXPRESSION_PARENTHESES

      static final String GLUE_EXPRESSION_PARENTHESES
      Property glueExpressionParentheses.

      If set, expressions in parentheses follow / end immediately after / before the parantheses. Default is true.

      true false 
       
      
 (1 < < 3)

 
       ( 1 < < 3 )
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_INITIALIZER_PARENTHESES

      static final String GLUE_INITIALIZER_PARENTHESES
      Property glueInitializerParentheses.

      If set, expressions in initializer blocks follow / end immediately after / before the brackets. Default is false.

      true false 
       
      
 {1, 2, 3}

 
       { 1, 2, 3 }
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_INFIX_OPERATORS

      static final String GLUE_INFIX_OPERATORS
      Property glueInfixOperators.

      If set, infix operators are attached to their operands. Default is false.

      true false 
       
      
 x=y>0?a+b*c:0

 
       
      
 x = y > 0 ? a + b * c : 0
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_UNARY_OPERATORS

      static final String GLUE_UNARY_OPERATORS
      Property glueUnaryOperators.

      If set, unary operators are attached to their operands. Default is true.

      true false 
       
      
 -(a++)

 
       -(a++)
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GLUE_MEMBERS

      static final String GLUE_MEMBERS
      Property glueMembers.

      If set, members follow without blank lines in between. Default is false.

      true false 
       
      
 int fee = 0; void foo() { ... } int faa(int x);

 
       
      
 int fee = 0;
 
      
 void foo() { ... }
 
      
 int faa(int x);
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      See Also:
